headline: Moonshot's Kimi K3 Launch Shakes AI Rivals as $60 Billion Cursor Deal Highlights Adoption
summary: Chinese AI models gain wider industry adoption as Moonshot tests premium pricing ahead of a reported Hong Kong listing.

headline: China’s ‘AI for All’ Push Defies US Containment Playbook
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China’s artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington, posing a new test for the standard protectionist playbook.Most Read from BloombergTrump’s 100% Generic Drug Duty Threatens US Low-Cost SupplyApple to Launch ‘Upgrade’ Device Leasing Program With Klarna to Spur SalesTrump Extends Pardons to Companies, Echoing a 17th Century KingSpaceX Set to Unlock $116 Billion in Shares After IPO Restrictions LiftTreasury F
